cluster_name: York and North Yorkshire Engineering Biology Life Sciences
strap: York and North Yorkshire Engineering Biology Life Sciences draws £1.51bn of UKRI lead-led funding across 2,454 grants, anchored by Leeds (25%), York (21%).
